subject: Re: Boost pump
body:
I am happy to report good news, the Gulfstream  will be ready at 4pm today in 
Millville New Jersey.
They are completing Engine Runs this morning and will call me when it is  
ready to depart.
I will airline to Philly today to fly Gulfstream to Teterboro.
Boeing aux pump, NO news yet.
 



**************Get trade secrets for amazing burgers. Watch "Cooking with 
Tyler Florence" on AOL Food.      
(http://food.aol.com/tyler-florence?video=4&?NCID=aolfod00030000000002)
